description: Test vectors for the AWSP signing/verification algorithm. body_hex is hex of the raw body bytes; secret_hex is hex of the raw secret bytes; signature is HMAC-SHA256 over `<timestamp>.<body-bytes>` -- timestamp formatted as decimal ASCII, body bytes appended verbatim. Outputs are lowercase hex.

vectors.name: valid_empty_body
vectors.description: Empty body, ASCII secret, on-time.

vectors.name: valid_small_json
vectors.description: Small JSON object body.

vectors.name: valid_utf8_multibyte
vectors.description: UTF-8 body with multibyte characters; HMAC is over body bytes, encoding-agnostic.

vectors.name: valid_1kb_body
vectors.description: 1024-byte ASCII body.

vectors.name: valid_64kb_body
vectors.description: 65536-byte ASCII body.

vectors.name: valid_binary_body
vectors.description: Body is bytes 0x00..0xff -- proves canonical string is byte-exact.

vectors.name: valid_raw32_secret
vectors.description: 32-byte raw-bytes secret (NUL bytes inclusive).

vectors.name: valid_short_secret
vectors.description: 16-byte raw-bytes secret.

vectors.name: valid_kid_b
vectors.description: Different kid + secret pair; receiver must select by kid.

vectors.name: valid_at_window_edge_minus
vectors.description: Timestamp exactly 300s old; default window allows it.

vectors.name: invalid_tampered_body_capitalized
vectors.description: Signature was generated for {"hello":"world"} but body delivered is {"hello":"WORLD"}.

vectors.name: invalid_tampered_body_one_byte
vectors.description: Single byte at offset 42 changed after signing.

vectors.name: invalid_truncated_body
vectors.description: Last byte of body removed after signing.

vectors.name: invalid_extended_body
vectors.description: Trailing space appended to body after signing.

vectors.name: invalid_wrong_secret_same_kid
vectors.description: Signature was computed with SECRET_B, but receiver only has SECRET_A under this kid.

vectors.name: invalid_garbage_signature
vectors.description: Signature is 64 lowercase hex but unrelated to body.

vectors.name: invalid_signature_timestamp_drift
vectors.description: Signature was computed with timestamp T0 but header carries t=T0+1.

vectors.name: invalid_unknown_kid
vectors.description: Header carries kid=k_unknown_2099; receiver does not have it.

vectors.name: invalid_signature_last_nibble_flipped
vectors.description: Last hex nibble of valid signature flipped to a different value.

vectors.name: invalid_kid_swap
vectors.description: Signature computed with SECRET_B but header carries kid for SECRET_A. Multi-kid receiver still rejects.

vectors.name: invalid_stale_301s
vectors.description: Timestamp 301 seconds in the past -- 1s past default window.

vectors.name: invalid_stale_one_hour
vectors.description: Timestamp 3600s old.

vectors.name: invalid_stale_one_day
vectors.description: Timestamp 86400s old.

vectors.name: invalid_future_301s
vectors.description: Timestamp 301 seconds in the future.

vectors.name: invalid_future_one_day
vectors.description: Timestamp 86400s in the future.

vectors.name: valid_edge_minus_300_exact
vectors.description: Timestamp exactly 300s in the past -- on the boundary, accepted.

vectors.name: valid_edge_plus_300_exact
vectors.description: Timestamp exactly 300s in the future -- on the boundary, accepted.

vectors.name: valid_120s_old_default_window
vectors.description: Timestamp 120s old. Valid under default 300s window. (Receivers running tighter 60s window would reject; not tested here.)

vectors.name: invalid_timestamp_epoch_zero
vectors.description: Timestamp = 0 (Unix epoch). Stale.

vectors.name: invalid_timestamp_ten_years_future
vectors.description: Timestamp 10 years in the future.

vectors.name: replay_simple
vectors.description: Same nonce already seen. Reject.

vectors.name: replay_same_nonce_different_body
vectors.description: Different body but nonce reused. Reject.

vectors.name: replay_same_nonce_different_kid
vectors.description: Same nonce as previous delivery, different kid. Reject -- nonce uniqueness is global, not kid-scoped.

vectors.name: replay_nonce_2
vectors.description: Different nonce, also seeded. Reject.

vectors.name: replay_nonce_3
vectors.description: Third reused nonce. Reject.

vectors.name: replay_at_minus_300
vectors.description: Replay at the oldest timestamp the window admits. Still rejected by nonce check.

vectors.name: replay_with_utf8_body
vectors.description: UTF-8 body, replayed nonce.

vectors.name: replay_with_64kb_body
vectors.description: 64KB body, replayed nonce. Replay check happens AFTER HMAC, so cost is full HMAC + storage hit.

vectors.name: replay_with_binary_body
vectors.description: Binary body, replayed nonce.

vectors.name: replay_with_kid_b
vectors.description: Replay using a different (valid) kid; nonce check is kid-agnostic.

vectors.name: malformed_missing_t
vectors.description: Header has no t= field.

vectors.name: malformed_missing_v1
vectors.description: Header has no v1= field; receiver also does not understand any vN= present.

vectors.name: malformed_missing_nonce
vectors.description: Header has no n= field.

vectors.name: malformed_missing_kid
vectors.description: Header has no kid= field. v1 mandates kid; receivers MUST reject.

vectors.name: malformed_garbage
vectors.description: Header is not even a list of pairs.
vectors.raw_signature_header: this is not a signature header

vectors.name: malformed_v1_not_hex
vectors.description: v1= value contains non-hex characters.

vectors.name: malformed_v1_uppercase_hex
vectors.description: v1= value uses uppercase hex (spec mandates lowercase).

vectors.name: malformed_unknown_algorithm_only
vectors.description: Header carries v99= but no v1=.

vectors.name: malformed_negative_timestamp
vectors.description: Timestamp is negative.

vectors.name: malformed_empty_header
vectors.description: Empty string header.
